prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.8 kg; Height 181.3 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 243mg/dL; 9 months ago 207mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.8kg; 9 months ago 82.6kg; 6 months ago 80.7kg; 3 months ago 78.1kg; current 83.8kg), Height (12 months ago 181.3cm; 9 months ago 181.3cm; 6 months ago 181.3cm; 3 months ago 181.3cm; current 181.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 93U/L; 9 months ago 88U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 88U/L; current 95U/L), AST (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 51U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 59U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 41mg/g; 9 months ago 29mg/g; 6 months ago 39mg/g; 3 months ago 30mg/g; current 36mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 102mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 148mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
